items.title: Canon EOS R6 Mark III Review: A Serious Upgrade
items.summary: With sharper resolution and lightning-fast performance, Canon’s latest full-frame mirrorless punches well above its class.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: YouTube now lets you offload your playlist curation to AI
items.summary: After releasing a feature to detect and label AI-generated videos, YouTube has released a new feature that will let you curate videos using... AI.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
items.summary: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"
